inline_comments.message: i am not sure is this works.. Can anyone give it a shot in the sandbox? I think this value might get overwritten if something else is specify in the Docker files of the repo. (I honestly don't have much experience configuring Dockerfiles but would there be a better place to set the tagging?)

I assume it shall be taken into account by the LF script in charge of building the dockers (gerrit-docker-verify/merge)

if stream  = master => docker tag = latest
if stream = branch_X => docker tag = branch_X

There is no reason when executing with stream branch_X to generate new docker with tag latest.
stream has to be taken into account in gerrit-docker-verify and gerrit-docker-merge

would something like that better?

      - gerrit-docker-merge:
          project-name: 'integration-xtesting-security'
          docker-root: ./security
          docker-name: 'onap/xtesting-security'
          docker-build-args: '-f ./docker/Dockerfile'
          docker-tag: {stream}

??

Hi Morgan,, I replied in IT-20480 with a better solution. Let me know what you think. 

Thanks!
